docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CASHCALL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVAN, ROB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-03-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-14-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS MARTINEAU. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-25-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 3, 2012 AT 1:30 PM FOR NEXT PROGRESS REPORT, THEN AFTER MARCH, 2013 FOR DISMISSAL.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSON. FILED BY CASHCALL INC. LEVAN, ROB

HEARING ON SC-105 REQUEST RE SET ASIDE DISMISSAL/AGREEMENT FILED BY ROB LEVAN IS GRANTED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT JIMENEZ--RECOVERY SPECIALIST. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVAN, ROB $840.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $840.00, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL/AGREEMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY 3 MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $200 BEGINNING 6/22/13, AND ONE PAYMENT OF $240 DUE 9/22/13. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JUN-22-2013 AND ON THE 22ND DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$38.00) SERVED JAN-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEVAN, ROB
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVAN, ROB
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.
ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER. YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT THE CASE TO BE HEARD. - JUDGE DONALD S. MITHCELL -
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON SC-105 REQUEST RE SET ASIDE DISMISSAL/AGREEMENT HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEVAN, ROB
